overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character riding a horse along a narrow mountain trail at night, following a companion through rocky terrain illuminated by a lantern. The scene transitions from grassy paths to rocky outcrops with valley views.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy mountain trail with scattered rocks and pine trees

events.description: trail surface transitions from grassy to dirt and rock as the path narrows

agents.ego_description: following a companion on horseback along a winding mountain trail illuminated by lantern light

notable_agents.action: companion walking ahead on the trail, leading the way through the mountain path

entered.detail: narrow dirt path with grass patches winding through the mountains
tall evergreen trees lining the mountain slope
steep rocky incline rising to the right of the trail
scattered boulders and rock formations along the trail edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the player character riding a horse along a grassy mountain trail at night, closely following a companion who walks ahead. The path is illuminated by a warm lantern light, with pine trees scattered along the route and rocky slopes rising to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain path with steep valley drop on left side

events.description: valley drop becomes visible on the left as the trail curves along the mountain edge
horse slows to carefully navigate around large rock formation blocking part of the path

agents.ego_description: carefully guiding the horse along the narrow rocky edge with a steep drop visible to the left

notable_agents.action: companion continuing ahead on the trail, now further in the distance

entered.detail: steep cliff edge dropping into darkness on the left side of the trail
massive boulders and rocky outcrops emerging along the right side
steep rock face rising vertically beside the trail

segments.scene_description: The terrain transitions to a rockier gravel path with a steep valley drop visible on the left. The horse navigates carefully around large rock formations while the companion continues ahead in the distance, and the trail becomes narrower with loose stones and boulders.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed rocky passage between large boulders and canyon walls

events.description: entering a more enclosed area between massive rock formations and overhanging cliffs
navigating around a massive boulder blocking the path, hugging the right wall

agents.ego_description: maneuvering through a narrow rocky corridor between large boulders and cliff faces

entered.detail: large rock formation overhanging the trail from above
steep rock walls rising on both sides of the narrow passage
scattered massive boulders and rock debris on the left side

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a narrow, enclosed rocky passage with massive boulders and overhanging rocks. The path winds between canyon walls, requiring careful navigation around obstacles, with the valley view now obscured by the towering rock formations.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a nocturnal mountain trail that transforms from an open grassy path into a claustrophobic rocky passage. It begins with the player riding a horse through scattered pine trees and grassy slopes, closely following a companion illuminated by the warm glow of a lantern. As the terrain shifts, the path becomes a narrow gravel trail of loose stones and boulders, opening up to reveal a steep valley drop on the left. The scene then tightens as the camera moves into an enclosed canyon, where the expansive valley view is obscured by towering rock formations and overhanging boulders. Finally, the journey winds through this narrow rocky corridor, navigating carefully between massive stone walls.
